agents.name: IntakeAgent
agents.role: Structure incoming requests into a standard handoff package.

agents.name: PlannerAgent
agents.role: Convert structured requests into implementation plans.

agents.name: BuilderAgent
agents.role: Execute the approved plan and produce artifacts.

agents.name: ReviewerAgent
agents.role: Verify quality, scope control, and readiness.

agents.name: ReleaseAgent
agents.role: Prepare release notes and final handoff.
